Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Service Request Verification SR to Contract Setup CS is identified as a direct prerequisite relation and Datacenter Allocation DA and Access Control Initialization ACI are identified as concurrent tasks after CS

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Base Network Configuration BNC and Debug Reconfigure DR are identified as a loop and Containerized Deployment CD and Monolithic Deployment MD are identified as an exclusive choice

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Quality Assurance QA and Security Audit SA are identified as concurrent tasks that both must complete before Go Live Approval GLA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Loop node BNC followed by optional DR repeat until exit loop equals OperatorPOWL with Operator LOOP and children bnc and d and r

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Exclusive choice after successful configuration CD or MD equals OperatorPOWL with Operator XOR and children cd and md

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: CS must be completed before DA and ACI both start in parallel so edges are added from cs to da and from cs to aci and no edge is added between da and aci

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: DA and ACI must be completed before the loop BNC so edges are added from da to loop and from aci to loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: QA and SA must both be completed before GLA is encoded but there is no edge from xor to qa or from xor to sa even though the text says these final tasks occur once the deployment method has been chosen and completed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The explanation checks that DA and ACI have no order between them and are concurrent and that QA and SA have no order between them and are concurrent

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Silent transitions are not explicitly needed here as all steps have labels
